holdings.infoBox: IDVO is an equity ETF with a total of 72 individual holdings. The top holdings are Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company stock at 5.08%, ASML Holding at 4.12%, Bank of Montreal at 3.29%, Mitsubishi UFJ Financial Group at 3.15%, and América Móvil at 3.07%.

overview.description: The Amplify CWP International Enhanced Dividend Income ETF (IDVO) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is an actively managed ETF that provides current income and capital appreciation by selecting dividend-paying ADRs of stocks from the MSCI ACWI ex USA Index, overlaid with a tactical call writing strategy. IDVO was launched on Sep 8, 2022 and is issued by Amplify Investments.

data.title: Amplify ETFs CEO on ETFs with income-focused strategies
data.text: Christian Magoon, Amplify ETFs CEO and founder, joins CNBC's Dominic Chu on 'Halftime Report' to discuss the firm's ETF suite which includes dividend and income-focused strategies via options.

data.title: ETF Edge: A fundamental shift in international investing as geopolitical concerns swing markets
data.text: Political and economic tensions, domestic headlines, currency flows and the Federal Reserve have all combined to reignite the “United States vs. international” investing debate.
